template_data.sub: Companies rushing to prime with zero past performance lose. The sub position is the strategic year-one move.
template_data.image_prompt: Split-panel infographic, horizontal layout. Left panel dark navy: bold label 'WRONG MOVE' at top-left with red X icon. Three short stacked labels in lighter gray: 'ZERO HISTORY', 'BID AS PRIME', 'LOSE BID'. Illustrated professional in business casual looking frustrated, arms crossed. Right panel cream/white: bold label 'RIGHT MOVE' at top-right with green checkmark icon. Three short stacked labels: 'BUILD HISTORY', 'WORK AS SUB', 'PRIME YEAR 3'. Illustrated professional in blazer shaking hands confidently. Bold headline centered at top across both panels: 'THE SUB IS THE STRATEGY'. Thin vertical dividing line between panels. Dark navy bottom band. Footer text: 'Jason · GSA Focus'.
